## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze --no-pub`
- [ ] `flutter test --no-pub`
- [ ] Example/docs updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] Relevant native build or device flow verified

## Release and security impact

- Breaking API or manifest change:
- New permission, network, file, installer, or credential behavior:
- Platforms tested:
